mapper.insert: insert ignore into subscription_fulfillment_task( order_id, user_id, service_package_id, total_quota, status, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time) values( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{servicePackageId}, #{totalQuota}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{failReason}, now(), now(), now())
mapper.update: update subscription_fulfillment_task set status = 'RETRY', retry_count = retry_count + 1, fail_reason = #{failReason}, next_retry_time = date_add(now(), interval 1 second), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and service_package_id = #{servicePackageId}

update subscription_fulfillment_task set status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and service_package_id = #{servicePackageId}
mapper.select: select id, order_id, user_id, service_package_id, total_quota, status, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time from subscription_fulfillment_task where ( status in ('PENDING', 'RETRY') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) or (status = 'PROCESSING' and update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 5 second)) ) order by id asc limit #{pageSize}
